description: Arrived at polling station at 06:30 for opening procedures. Observed that seals on ballot box #3 were already broken before polls opened at 07:00. Presiding officer claimed they 'must have been damaged in transit' but could not produce the seal integrity log. Approximately 300 ballots already visibly inside the box. Two other observers from EU mission also witnessed this.
witnesses: James Ochieng (EU LTO), Mary Wambui (Carter Center STO)
